```json
  "order": ["prepare-equipment", "rough-position-machines", "install-alignment-tooling", "measure-initial-runout", "check-soft-foot", "correct-soft-foot", "measure-alignment", "adjust-alignment", "verify-coupling-gap", "verify-angular-offset", "verify-parallel_offset", "record-final-values", "torque-foot-bolts", "final-verify"],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": ["Coupling gap is out of specification while shaft alignment is in progress", "Alignment cannot be accepted or finalized with coupling gap non-compliant", "Continuing without correction risks coupling damage, vibration, and bearing overload"],
  "actions": ["Stop alignment finalization and re-measure coupling gap per drawing/specification", "Check and correct machine foot soft foot if present", "Reposition driver or driven machine axially to achieve specified coupling gap", "Re-run laser alignment verification after gap correction", "Record final alignment values including gap, angular, and parallel offset before releasing work"],
  "rationale": "API 686 requires shaft alignment to be within specified tolerances, including coupling gap, angular, and parallel offset. A coupling gap out of spec during in-progress alignment is a sequence violation because final alignment cannot be completed or accepted until all alignment parameters, including gap, meet specification. Continuing would leave the equipment installed in a defective, non-compliant condition.",
  "references": ["API 686"]
}
```
